name: Cloner
description: A blazing-fast trickster who can copy anything. Cloner conjures up a duplicate weapon out of thin air - but they're fragile, so they have to keep moving and let their clones do the fighting.

ability.name: Copycat
ability.description: Aim at any piece of furniture - a chair, a wall, a vending machine - and Cloner copies it, dropping a fresh duplicate right beside it. Build cover, block doors, make a mess.
